mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT X.* , ROWNUM as rn FROM ( SELECT b.board_id as qna_id, b.title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(B.CONTENT, 120, 1) AS preview, b.like_count as likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_board a WHERE a.parent_id = b.board_id AND a.board_type='A') as answerCount, b.reg_date, (SELECT MIN(h.hashtag_name) FROM tbl_board_aspect asp JOIN tbl_hashtag_list h ON h.hashtag_id = asp.board_hashtag_id WHERE asp.board_id = b.board_id) as tagName FROM tbl_board b
b.board_type = 'Q'
AND EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM tbl_board_aspect asp JOIN tbl_hashtag_list h ON h.hashtag_id=asp.board_hashtag_id WHERE asp.board_id = b.board_id AND h.hashtag_name =#{tagName} )
ORDER BY
likeCount
answerCount
b.reg_date
ASC DESC
) X WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn > #{startRow}

SELECT x.*,ROWNUM FROM (SELECT a.board_hashtag_id, COUNT(a.board_hashtag_id) as tagCount, h.hashtag_name as tagName FROM tbl_board_aspect a LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_hashtag_list h ON a.board_hashtag_id=h.hashtag_id GROUP BY a.board_hashtag_id, h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag_name ORDER BY tagCount DESC) x WHERE ROWNUM <= 15

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_board b
b.board_type = 'Q'
AND EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM tbl_board_aspect asp JOIN tbl_hashtag_list h ON h.hashtag_id = asp.board_hashtag_id WHERE asp.board_id = b.board_id AND h.hashtag_name = #{tagName} )
